name: Uncle Roy's Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 can stewed tomatoes, broken up (with liquid), 28 oz.
1 can Mexican-style tomatoes, broken up (with liquid), 15-16 oz.
2 cans kidney beans, rinsed and drained, 15-16 oz each
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Add onions and garlic; cook until soft.
3. Stir in stewed tomatoes, chili powder, Tabasco sauce, and kidney beans.
4. Simmer about 30 minutes, allowing flavors to blend.
5. Add rinsed and drained kidney beans; simmer another 20-30 minutes.
